violations.finding: NEW inline bash block added in this diff: GRAPHIFY_SENTINEL variable assignment + if [[ -f ]] conditional with echo branches. This is functional orchestration logic embedded in a command file, not an example section.
violations.recommendation: Extract to a script such as scripts/graphify-sentinel-check.py (or .sh) that accepts --task-id and returns dispatch_graphify:true|false, invoked with source venv/bin/activate && python3. Alternatively, convert to prose-only description with no fenced bash block.

violations.finding: Bare python3 invocation in Step 9 blast-radius tool code block: `python3 scripts/blast-radius-tool.py \` without venv activation. This is an operational instruction (not an example) for running the blast-radius tool.
violations.recommendation: Change to: source venv/bin/activate && python3 scripts/blast-radius-tool.py \

violations.finding: Bare python3 invocation in cp-state lifecycle SOP table: `python3 /root/.claude/scripts/spec-check.py`. This describes the required mutation command, not harmless documentation.

Decimal step headers used as section labels: `Step 10.1` (E2E Script Discovery), `Step 10.2` (App Understanding Flow), `Step 10.3` (UI Evidence Schema), `Step 10.4` (Output Quality Verification), `Step 10.5` (Focus Criteria Verification). Standard 4 has no sub-step header exception.
violations.recommendation: Rename to non-decimal section headers, e.g. `#### E2E Check: Project E2E Script Discovery`, `#### E2E Check: App Understanding Flow`, `### UI Evidence Schema`, etc. Update all cross-references at lines 290, 292, 303, 750, 751 to use the new section names.

violations.finding: Pre-existing inline Python heredoc block: `python3 - <<'PYEOF'` followed by 15 lines of Python file-patching logic (reading/writing context.json, updating spec_path). This is functional Python code embedded in a command file, not an example.
violations.recommendation: Extract to scripts/patch-context-spec-path.py accepting --context-json and --spec-path arguments. Invoke with: source "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/venv/bin/activate" && python3 "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/scripts/patch-context-spec-path.py" --context-json "$CONTEXT_JSON" --spec-path "$orchestrator_resolved_spec_path"

violations.finding: Bare python3 invocation in inline heredoc: `python3 - <<'PYEOF'` without venv activation. This is the same block as the no-inline-code violation above, also violating Standard 3.
violations.recommendation: When extracting to a script per the no-inline-code fix above, invoke with venv activation: source "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/venv/bin/activate" && python3 ...

violations.finding: Bare python3 invocation presented as the default: `Run each script: python3 <script-path>` with venv activation listed as an optional alternative. Standard 3 requires source venv to be the canonical form, not the fallback.
violations.recommendation: Change to: `Run each script: source venv/bin/activate && python <script-path>` (removing the bare python3 option).

violations.finding: Bare python3 invocation in Phase 6 blast-radius tool code block: `python3 scripts/blast-radius-tool.py \` without venv activation. This is an operational instruction for QA to execute the tool.
violations.recommendation: Change to: source venv/bin/activate && python3 scripts/blast-radius-tool.py \

standards_passed: no-hardcoded-values (graphify-enrich.py, graphify-query.py — all file paths derived from argparse/env)
meaningful-naming (no forbidden pattern files in scripts/)
english-only (no CJK bytes in any in-scope file; agents/graphify.md, agents/ba.md clean; graphify-query.py Unicode escapes are ASCII-clean source bytes, exempted per Standard 6 detection algorithm)
merge-similar-scripts (graphify-enrich.py and graphify-query.py serve distinct pipeline stages)
concise-documentation (agents/graphify.md is concise and functional; commands/pull.md change is a single-line venv fix)
parameterized-scripts (graphify-enrich.py, graphify-query.py use argparse with required params)
dangling-references (graphify_lib.py, graphify-enrich.py, graphify-query.py, graphify-maintain.py all exist)
merge-conflicts (no merge conflict markers in any changed file)

codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex confirmed all 4 draft violations as true positives. Identified 2 additional missed violations (commands/dev.md:480-496 pre-existing no-inline-code+use-source-venv; agents/qa.md:1099 bare python3) and 1 additional location for qa.md:746 use-source-venv. Codex also expanded the V4 location list (decimal step cross-references at qa.md:290,292,303,750,751). Confirmed graphify-query.py:47 Unicode escapes are NOT a Standard 6 violation (source bytes are ASCII-clean).
